mechanism_narrative: A sustained low federal funds rate compresses the equity discount rate and supports risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC of FEDFUNDS levels over 20-day forward returns remains below 0.03 on any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in nonfarm payrolls signals labor market deterioration that reduces corporate earnings expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS monthly declines fail to coincide with negative 20-day SPX returns in more than 55 percent of occurrences over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate broad demand weakness that amplifies downside revenue risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint decline of RSAFS and HOUST does not produce significantly worse 60-day returns than either series alone in a t-test at the 10 percent level.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-recession demand recovery, moderate positive real GDP growth signals healing balance sheets without imminent tightening, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth greater than zero
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth quarters in post-recession periods fail to produce positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 55 percent of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month drop in industrial production signals supply-side contraction that squeezes corporate profit margins, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO monthly declines do not coincide with negative 20-day SPX returns in more than 55 percent of occurrences over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising trend in real retail sales indicates persistent consumer demand strength that translates into positive revenue surprises and positive 60-day S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: RSAFS 3-month momentum shows Rank IC below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in the unemployment rate and fall in nonfarm payrolls indicates accelerating labor market deterioration that depresses aggregate income and equity valuations, driving negative 20-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: The UNRATE and PAYEMS interaction term adds no significant marginal explanatory power for 20-day returns in a multivariate regression at the 5 percent level.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the federal funds rate from the zero lower bound signals the onset of a tightening cycle that abruptly revalues equity discount rates, producing negative 5-day S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Monthly increases in FEDFUNDS coincide with negative 5-day SPX returns in fewer than 55 percent of occurrences.
